description_long: This object depicts a farmstead with multiple residential and agricultural buildings surrounded by lush green trees and open fields. The central area features two main houses with light-colored walls and gabled roofs, separated by a driveway and small garden spaces. To one side, there is a large cultivated field with visible planting rows, while the other side contains a grassy paddock or pasture. The property is bordered by a paved road with a parked car, and the entire area is enclosed by low fencing and dense tree lines. The layout suggests a well-maintained, modern rural property with both residential and agricultural functions. No large farm machinery or distinctive rural signage is visible, and the architectural style of the buildings is simple and functional, reminiscent of modern agricultural sheds or farmhouses.
description: A modern farmstead with two main houses, open fields, and tree-lined borders, set beside a paved road. The property includes cultivated land, grassy areas, and a driveway, all enclosed by fencing and dense vegetation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main houses, driveway, and tree-lined entrance from the road, with fields and gardens behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large open field and the rear of the houses, with dense trees and fencing visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the cultivated field and grassy paddock, with the houses partially obscured by trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the road, car, and the side of the property, with fields and trees extending to the back.
